infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: The Knoxville Drone Guy uses the camera so clients and admin can attach photos or videos in chat and job updates.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: The Knoxville Drone Guy uses your photo library so you can select photos or videos for chat and job updates.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: The Knoxville Drone Guy shares the admin phone location only with the assigned client while an active job is in progress.

plugins.photosPermission: The Knoxville Drone Guy uses your photo library so you can select photos or videos for chat and job updates.
plugins.cameraPermission: The Knoxville Drone Guy uses the camera so clients and admin can attach photos or videos in chat and job updates.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: The Knoxville Drone Guy shares the admin phone location only with the assigned client while an active job is in progress.
